items.title: RTNN: accelerating neighbor search using hardware ray tracing.
items.abstract: Neighbor search is of fundamental important to many engineering and science fields such as physics simulation and computer graphics. This paper proposes to formulate neighbor search as a ray tracing problem and leverage the dedicated ray tracing hardware in recent GPUs for acceleration. We show that a naive mapping under-exploits the ray tracing hardware. We propose two performance optimizations, query scheduling and query partitioning, to tame the inefficiencies. Experimental results show 2.2X -- 65.0X speedups over existing neighbor search libraries on GPUs. The code is available at https://github.com/horizon-research/rtnn.
items.abstract_zh: 邻域搜索对于物理模拟和计算机图形学等许多工程和科学领域至关重要。本文建议将邻居搜索表述为光线追踪问题，并利用最新 GPU 中的专用光线追踪硬件进行加速。我们表明，简单的映射没有充分利用光线追踪硬件。我们提出了两种性能优化：查询调度和查询分区，以解决效率低下的问题。实验结果显示，与 GPU 上现有的邻居搜索库相比，速度提高了 2.2 倍至 65 倍。代码可在 https://github.com/horizo​​n-research/rtnn 获取。

items.title: wCQ: a fast wait-free queue with bounded memory usage.
items.abstract: The concurrency literature presents a number of approaches for building non-blocking, FIFO, multiple-producer and multiple-consumer (MPMC) queues. However, only a fraction of them have high performance. In addition, many queue designs, such as LCRQ, trade memory usage for better performance. The recently proposed SCQ design achieves both memory efficiency as well as excellent performance. Unfortunately, both LCRQ and SCQ are only lock-free. On the other hand, existing wait-free queues are either not very performant or suffer from potentially unbounded memory usage. Strictly described, the latter queues, such as Yang & Mellor-Crummey's (YMC) queue, forfeit wait-freedom as they are blocking when memory is exhausted. We present a wait-free queue, called wCQ. wCQ is based on SCQ and uses its own variation of fast-path-slow-path methodology to attain wait-freedom and bound memory usage. Our experimental studies on x86 and PowerPC architectures validate wCQ's great performance and memory efficiency. They also show that wCQ's performance is often on par with the best known concurrent queue designs.

items.title: Automatic synthesis of parallel unix commands and pipelines with KumQuat.
items.abstract: We present KumQuat, a system for automatically generating data-parallel implementations of Unix shell commands and pipelines. The generated parallel versions split input streams, execute multiple instantiations of the original pipeline commands to process the splits in parallel, then combine the resulting parallel outputs to produce the final output stream. KumQuat automatically synthesizes the combine operators, with a domain-specific combiner language acting as a strong regularizer that promotes efficient inference of correct combiners. We present experimental results that show that these combiners enable the effective parallelization of our benchmark scripts.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 KumQuat，一个用于自动生成 Unix shell 命令和管道的数据并行实现的系统。生成的并行版本分割输入流，执行原始管道命令的多个实例以并行处理分割，然后组合生成的并行输出以生成最终输出流。 KumQuat 自动合成组合运算符，并使用特定于领域的组合器语言作为强大的正则化器，促进正确组合器的有效推理。我们提供的实验结果表明，这些组合器可以实现我们的基准脚本的有效并行化。

items.title: PathCAS: an efficient middle ground for concurrent search data structures.
Near-optimal sparse allreduce for distributed deep learning.
items.abstract: Communication overhead is one of the major obstacles to train large deep learning models at scale. Gradient sparsification is a promising technique to reduce the communication volume. However, it is very challenging to obtain real performance improvement because of (1) the difficulty of achieving an scalable and efficient sparse allreduce algorithm and (2) the sparsification overhead. This paper proposes Ok-Topk, a scheme for distributed training with sparse gradients. Ok-Topk integrates a novel sparse allreduce algorithm (less than 6k communication volume which is asymptotically optimal) with the decentralized parallel Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) optimizer, and its convergence is proved. To reduce the sparsification overhead, Ok-Topk efficiently selects the top-k gradient values according to an estimated threshold. Evaluations are conducted on the Piz Daint supercomputer with neural network models from different deep learning domains. Empirical results show that Ok-Topk achieves similar model accuracy to dense allreduce. Compared with the optimized dense and the state-of-the-art sparse allreduces, Ok-Topk is more scalable and significantly improves training throughput (e.g., 3.29x-12.95x improvement for BERT on 256 GPUs).
items.abstract_zh: 通信开销是大规模训练大型深度学习模型的主要障碍之一。梯度稀疏化是一种有前途的减少通信量的技术。然而，由于（1）难以实现可扩展且高效的稀疏 allreduce 算法以及（2）稀疏化开销，获得真正的性能改进非常具有挑战性。本文提出了 Ok-Topk，一种稀疏梯度分布式训练方案。 Ok-Topk将新颖的稀疏allreduce算法（小于6k通信量，渐近最优）与去中心化并行随机梯度下降（SGD）优化器相结合，并证明了其收敛性。为了减少稀疏化开销，Ok-Topk 根据估计的阈值有效地选择 top-k 梯度值。使用来自不同深度学习领域的神经网络模型在 Piz Daint 超级计算机上进行评估。实证结果表明，Ok-Topk 实现了与密集 allreduce 相似的模型精度。与优化的密集和最先进的稀疏 allreduce 相比，Ok-Topk 更具可扩展性，并显着提高了训练吞吐量（例如，256 个 GPU 上的 BERT 提高了 3.29 倍至 12.95 倍）。

items.title: CASE: a compiler-assisted SchEduling framework for multi-GPU systems.
The problem-based benchmark suite (PBBS), V2.
items.abstract: The Problem-Based Benchmark Suite (PBBS) is a set of benchmark problems designed for comparing algorithms, implementations and platforms. For each problem, the suite defines the problem in terms of the input-output relationship, and supplies a set of input instances along with input generators, a default implementation, code for checking correctness or accuracy, and a timing harness. The suite makes it possible to compare different algorithms, platforms (e.g. GPU vs CPU), and implementations using different programming languages or libraries. The purpose is to better understand how well a wide variety of problems parallelize, and what techniques/algorithms are most effective.
items.abstract_zh: 基于问题的基准套件 (PBBS) 是一组基准问题，旨在比较算法、实现和平台。对于每个问题，该套件根据输入输出关系定义问题，并提供一组输入实例以及输入生成器、默认实现、用于检查正确性或准确性的代码以及时序工具。该套件可以比较不同的算法、平台（例如 GPU 与 CPU）以及使用不同编程语言或库的实现。目的是更好地了解各种问题的并行化程度，以及哪些技术/算法最有效。

items.title: Detectable recovery of lock-free data structures.
items.abstract: This paper presents a generic approach for deriving detectably recoverable implementations of many widely-used concurrent data structures. Such implementations are appealing for emerging systems featuring byte-addressable non-volatile main memory (NVMM), whose persistence allows to efficiently resurrect failed threads after crashes. Detectable recovery ensures that after a crash, every executed operation is able to recover and return a correct response, and that the state of the data structure is not corrupted.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通用方法，用于导出许多广泛使用的并发数据结构的可检测可恢复实现。这种实现对于具有字节可寻址非易失性主存储器（NVMM）的新兴系统很有吸引力，其持久性允许在崩溃后有效地恢复失败的线程。可检测的恢复可确保崩溃后，每个执行的操作都能够恢复并返回正确的响应，并且数据结构的状态不会损坏。

items.title: Lock-free locks revisited.
items.abstract: This paper presents a new and practical approach to lock-free locks based on helping, which allows the user to write code using fine-grained locks, but run it in a lock-free manner. Although lock-free locks have been suggested in the past, they are widely viewed as impractical, have some key limitations, and, as far as we know, have never been implemented. The paper presents some key techniques that make lock-free locks practical and more general. The most important technique is an approach to idempotence---i.e. making code that runs multiple times appear as if it ran once. The idea is based on using a shared log among processes running the same protected code. Importantly, the approach can be library based, requiring very little if any change to standard code---code just needs to use the idempotent versions of memory operations (load, store, LL/SC, allocation, free).
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于帮助的新的、实用的无锁锁方法，它允许用户使用细粒度锁编写代码，但以无锁的方式运行它。尽管过去曾提出过无锁锁，但人们普遍认为它们不切实际，有一些关键限制，而且据我们所知，它们从未得到实施。本文介绍了一些使无锁锁实用且更通用的关键技术。最重要的技术是幂等性方法——即使运行多次的代码看起来就像运行了一次一样。这个想法基于在运行相同受保护代码的进程之间使用共享日志。重要的是，该方法可以基于库，几乎不需要对标准代码进行任何更改——代码只需要使用内存操作的幂等版本（加载、存储、LL/SC、分配、释放）。

items.title: Scaling graph traversal to 281 trillion edges with 40 million cores.
items.abstract: Graph processing, especially high-performance graph traversal, plays a more and more important role in data analytics. The successor of Sunway TaihuLight, New Sunway, is equipped with nearly 10 PB memory and over 40 million cores, which brings the opportunity to process hundreds of trillions of edges graphs. However, the graph with an unprecedented scale also brings severe performance challenges, including load imbalance, poor locality, and irregular access of graph traversal workload.
items.abstract_zh: 图处理，尤其是高性能图遍历，在数据分析中发挥着越来越重要的作用。神威·太湖之光的后继产品——新神威，配备了近10PB内存和超过4000万个核心，带来了处理数百万亿边图的机会。然而，规模空前的图也带来了严峻的性能挑战，包括负载不平衡、局部性差、图遍历工作量访问不规律等。

items.title: Optimizing sparse computations jointly.
items.abstract: This work proposes a framework called FuSy that analyzes the data dependence graphs (DAGs) of two sparse kernels and creates an efficient schedule to execute the kernels in combination. Sparse kernels are frequently used in scientific codes and in machine learning algorithms and very often they are used in combination. Iterative linear system solvers are an example where kernels such as sparse triangular solver (SpTRSV) and sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) are called consecutively in each iteration of the solver. Prior approaches typically optimize these sparse kernels independently leading to high synchronization overheads and low locality. We propose an approach that analyzes the DAGs of two sparse kernels and then creates a new order of execution that enables running the two kernels efficiently in parallel. To investigate the efficiency of our approach, we compare it with the state-of-the-art MKL library for two kernel combinations, SpTRSV-SpMV and SpMV-SpTRSV which are commonly used in iterative solvers. Experimental results show that our approach is on average 2.6X and 1.8X faster than the MKL library for a set of matrices from the Suitesparse matrix repository.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一个名为 FuSy 的框架，该框架分析两个稀疏内核的数据依赖图（DAG），并创建一个有效的调度来组合执行内核。稀疏核经常用于科学代码和机器学习算法中，并且它们经常组合使用。迭代线性系统求解器是一个示例，其中在求解器的每次迭代中连续调用稀疏三角求解器 (SpTRSV) 和稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 等内核。先前的方法通常独立地优化这些稀疏内核，导致高同步开销和低局部性。我们提出了一种方法来分析两个稀疏内核的 D​​AG，然后创建一个新的执行顺序，从而能够有效地并行运行两个内核。为了研究我们方法的效率，我们将其与迭代求解器中常用的两种内核组合 SpTRSV-SpMV 和 SpMV-SpTRSV 的最先进的 MKL 库进行了比较。实验结果表明，对于 Suitesparse 矩阵存储库中的一组矩阵，我们的方法平均比 MKL 库快 2.6 倍和 1.8 倍。

items.title: Dopia: online parallelism management for integrated CPU/GPU architectures.
Deadlock-free asynchronous message reordering in rust with multiparty session types.
items.abstract: Rust is a modern systems language focused on performance and reliability. Complementing Rust's promise to provide "fearless concurrency", developers frequently exploit asynchronous message passing. Unfortunately, sending and receiving messages in an arbitrary order to maximise computation-communication overlap (a popular optimisation in message-passing applications) opens up a Pandora's box of subtle concurrency bugs.
items.abstract_zh: Rust 是一种注重性能和可靠性的现代系统语言。为了补充 Rust 提供“无畏并发”的承诺，开发人员经常利用异步消息传递。不幸的是，以任意顺序发送和接收消息以最大化计算通信重叠（消息传递应用程序中的流行优化）会导致微妙的并发错误的潘多拉魔盒。

items.title: LOTUS: locality optimizing triangle counting.
Interference relation-guided SMT solving for multi-threaded program verification.
items.abstract: Concurrent program verification is challenging due to a large number of thread interferences. A popular approach is to encode concurrent programs as SMT formulas and then rely on off-the-shelf SMT solvers to accomplish the verification. In most existing works, an SMT solver is simply treated as the backend. There is little research on improving SMT solving for concurrent program verification.
items.abstract_zh: 由于存在大量线程干扰，并发程序验证具有挑战性。一种流行的方法是将并发程序编码为 SMT 公式，然后依靠现成的 SMT 求解器来完成验证。在大多数现有作品中，SMT 求解器被简单地视为后端。针对并发程序验证改进 SMT 求解的研究很少。

items.title: The performance power of software combining in persistence.
items.abstract: The availability of Non-Volatile Main Memory (known as NVMM) enables the design of recoverable concurrent algorithms. We study the power of software combining in achieving recoverable synchronization and designing persistent data structures. Software combining is a general synchronization approach, which attempts to simulate the ideal world when executing synchronization requests (i.e., requests that must be executed in mutual exclusion). A single thread, called the combiner, executes all active requests, while the rest of the threads are waiting for the combiner to notify them that their requests have been applied. Software combining significantly decreases the synchronization cost and outperforms many other synchronization techniques in various cases.
items.abstract_zh: 非易失性主存储器（称为 NVMM）的可用性使得可恢复并发算法的设计成为可能。我们研究软件组合在实现可恢复同步和设计持久数据结构方面的力量。软件组合是一种通用的同步方法，它试图在执行同步请求（即必须以互斥方式执行的请求）时模拟理想世界。称为组合器的单个线程执行所有活动请求，而其余线程则等待组合器通知它们它们的请求已被应用。软件组合显着降低了同步成本，并且在各种情况下优于许多其他同步技术。

items.title: A parallel branch-and-bound algorithm with history-based domination.
items.abstract: In this paper, we describe a parallel Branch-and-Bound (B&B) algorithm with a history-based domination technique, and we apply it to the Sequential Ordering Problem (SOP). To the best of our knowledge, the proposed algorithm is the first parallel B&B algorithm that includes a history-based domination technique and is the first parallel B&B algorithm for solving the SOP using a pure B&B approach. The proposed algorithm takes a pool-based approach and employs a collection of novel techniques that we have developed to achieve effective parallel exploration of the solution space, including parallel history domination, history table memory management, and a thread restart technique. The proposed algorithm was experimentally evaluated using the SOPLIB and TSPLIB benchmarks. The results show that using ten threads with a time limit of one hour on the medium-difficulty instances, the proposed algorithm gives a geometric-mean speedup of 19.9 on SOPLIB and 10.23 on TSPLIB, with super-linear speedups up to 65x seen on 17 instances.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了一种具有基于历史的支配技术的并行分支定界（B＆B）算法，并将其应用于顺序排序问题（SOP）。据我们所知，所提出的算法是第一个包含基于历史的支配技术的并行 B&B 算法，也是第一个使用纯 B&B 方法求解 SOP 的并行 B&B 算法。所提出的算法采用基于池的方法，并采用了我们开发的一系列新技术来实现解决方案空间的有效并行探索，包括并行历史支配、历史表内存管理和线程重启技术。使用 SOPLIB 和 TSPLIB 基准对所提出的算法进行了实验评估。结果表明，在中等难度的实例上使用十个线程，时间限制为一小时，所提出的算法在 SOPLIB 上的几何平均加速为 19.9，在 TSPLIB 上的几何平均加速为 10.23，在 17 个实例上超线性加速高达 65 倍。

items.title: Extending the limit of molecular dynamics with ab initio accuracy to 10 billion atoms.
items.abstract: High-performance computing, together with a neural network model trained from data generated with first-principles methods, has greatly boosted applications of ab initio molecular dynamics in terms of spatial and temporal scales on modern supercomputers. Previous state-of-the-art can achieve 1 -- 2 nanoseconds molecular dynamics simulation per day for 100-million atoms on the entire Summit supercomputer. In this paper, we have significantly reduced the memory footprint and computational time by a comprehensive approach with both algorithmic and system innovations. The neural network model is compressed by model tabulation, kernel fusion, and redundancy removal. Then optimizations such as acceleration of customized kernel, tabulation of activation function, MPI+OpenMP parallelization are implemented on GPU and ARM architectures. Testing results of the copper system show that the optimized code can scale up to the entire machine of both Fugaku and Summit, and the corresponding system size can be extended by a factor of 134 to an unprecedented 17 billion atoms. The strong scaling of a 13.5-million atom copper system shows that the time-to-solution can be 7 times faster, reaching 11.2 nanoseconds per day. This work opens the door for unprecedentedly large-scale molecular dynamics simulations based on ab initio accuracy and can be potentially utilized in studying more realistic applications such as mechanical properties of metals, semiconductor devices, batteries, etc. The optimization techniques detailed in this paper also provide insight for relevant high-performance computing applications.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算，加上根据第一原理方法生成的数据训练的神经网络模型，极大地促进了从头算分子动力学在现代超级计算机上的空间和时间尺度上的应用。此前最先进的技术可以在整个Summit超级计算机上实现每天1——2纳秒的1亿个原子的分子动力学模拟。在本文中，我们通过算法和系统创新的综合方法显着减少了内存占用和计算时间。通过模型制表、核融合、冗余去除等方法对神经网络模型进行压缩。然后在GPU和ARM架构上实现了定制内核加速、激活函数制表、MPI+OpenMP并行化等优化。铜系统的测试结果表明，优化后的代码可以扩展到Fugaku和Summit的整机，相应的系统规模可以扩展134倍，达到前所未有的170亿个原子。 1350 万原子铜系统的强大扩展表明，解决问题的时间可以快 7 倍，达到每天 11.2 纳秒。这项工作为基于从头计算精度的前所未有的大规模分子动力学模拟打开了大门，并可用于研究更现实的应用，例如金属、半导体器件、电池等的机械性能。本文详细介绍的优化技术也为相关高性能计算应用提供了见解。

items.title: FasterMoE: modeling and optimizing training of large-scale dynamic pre-trained models.
items.abstract: Artifact evaluation codebase for PPoPP'22 submission #88
items.abstract_zh: PPoPP'22 提交的工件评估代码库 #88

items.title: Hardening selective protection across multiple program inputs for HPC applications.
items.abstract: With the ever-shrinking size of transistors and increasing scale of applications, silent data corruptions (SDCs) have become a common yet serious issue in HPC applications. Selective instruction duplication (SID) is a popular fault-tolerance technique that can obtain a high SDC coverage with low-performance overhead, as it selects the most vulnerable parts of a program for protection with priority. However, existing studies of SID are confined to single program input in the evaluation, assuming that the error resilience of the program remains similar across inputs, leading to a drastic loss of SDC coverage from SID when the protected program runs different inputs. Hence, we proposed Sentinel, an automated compiler-based framework to mitigate the loss of SDC coverage. Evaluation results show that Sentinel can effectively mitigate the loss of SDC coverage (up to 97.00%) across multiple inputs, which significantly hardens existing SID techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 随着晶体管尺寸的不断缩小和应用程序规模的不断扩大，静默数据损坏（SDC）已成为 HPC 应用程序中常见但严重的问题。选择性指令复制（SID）是一种流行的容错技术，它可以以较低的性能开销获得高SDC覆盖率，因为它会优先选择程序中最脆弱的部分进行保护。然而，现有的 SID 研究仅限于评估中的单个程序输入，假设程序的错误恢复能力在输入之间保持相似，导致当受保护的程序运行不同的输入时，SID 的 SDC 覆盖范围急剧下降。因此，我们提出了 Sentinel，一个基于自动化编译器的框架，以减轻 SDC 覆盖范围的损失。评估结果表明，Sentinel 可以有效减轻多个输入的 SDC 覆盖率损失（高达 97.00%），这显着强化了现有的 SID 技术。

items.title: Automatic differentiation of parallel loops with formal methods.
items.abstract: This paper presents a novel combination of reverse mode automatic differentiation and formal methods, to enable efficient differentiation of (or backpropagation through) shared-memory parallel loops. Compared to the state of the art, our approach can reduce the need for atomic updates or private data copies during the parallel derivative computation, even in the presence of unstructured or data-dependent data access patterns. This is achieved by gathering information about the memory access patterns from the input program, which is assumed to be correctly parallelized. This information is then used to build a model of assertions in a theorem prover, which can be used to check the safety of shared memory accesses during the parallel derivative loops. We demonstrate this approach on scientific computing benchmarks including a lattice-Boltzmann method (LBM) solver from the Parboil benchmark suite and a Green’s function Monte Carlo (GFMC) kernel from the CORAL benchmark suite.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了反向模式自动微分和形式化方法的新颖组合，以实现共享内存并行循环的有效微分（或通过反向传播）。与现有技术相比，我们的方法可以减少并行导数计算期间对原子更新或私有数据副本的需求，即使存在非结构化或数据依赖型数据访问模式。这是通过从输入程序收集有关内存访问模式的信息来实现的，假设输入程序已正确并行化。然后，该信息用于在定理证明器中构建断言模型，该模型可用于检查并行导数循环期间共享内存访问的安全性。我们在科学计算基准测试中演示了这种方法，包括来自 Parboil 基准测试套件的格子玻尔兹曼方法 (LBM) 求解器和来自 CORAL 基准测试套件的格林函数蒙特卡罗 (GFMC) 内核。

items.title: PerFlow: a domain specific framework for automatic performance analysis of parallel applications.
Stream processing with dependency-guided synchronization.
items.abstract: Real-time data processing applications with low latency requirements have led to the increasing popularity of stream processing systems. While such systems offer convenient APIs that can be used to achieve data parallelism automatically, they offer limited support for computations that require synchronization between parallel nodes. In this paper, we propose *dependency-guided synchronization (DGS)*, an alternative programming model and stream processing API for stateful streaming computations with complex synchronization requirements. In the proposed model, the input is viewed as partially ordered, and the program consists of a set of parallelization constructs which are applied to decompose the partial order and process events independently. Our API maps to an execution model called *synchronization plans* which supports synchronization between parallel nodes. Our evaluation shows that APIs offered by two widely used systems -- Flink and Timely Dataflow -- cannot suitably expose parallelism in some representative applications. In contrast, DGS enables implementations with scalable performance, the resulting synchronization plans offer throughput improvements when implemented manually in existing systems, and the programming overhead is small compared to writing sequential code.
items.abstract_zh: 低延迟要求的实时数据处理应用导致流处理系统越来越受欢迎。虽然此类系统提供了方便的 API，可用于自动实现数据并行性，但它们对需要并行节点之间同步的计算提供有限的支持。在本文中，我们提出了*依赖引导同步（DGS）*，这是一种替代编程模型和流处理 API，用于具有复杂同步要求的状态流计算。在所提出的模型中，输入被视为部分有序，并且程序由一组并行化结构组成，这些结构用于分解部分顺序并独立地处理事件。我们的 API 映射到名为“同步计划”的执行模型，该模型支持并行节点之间的同步。我们的评估表明，两个广泛使用的系统（Flink 和 Timely Dataflow）提供的 API 无法在某些代表性应用程序中适当地公开并行性。相比之下，DGS 支持具有可扩展性能的实现，在现有系统中手动实现时，生成的同步计划可提高吞吐量，并且与编写顺序代码相比，编程开销很小。

items.title: Jiffy: a lock-free skip list with batch updates and snapshots.
items.abstract: In this paper we introduce Jiffy, the first lock-free, linearizable ordered key-value index that offers both (1) batch updates, which are put and remove operations that are executed atomically, and (2) consistent snapshots used by, e.g., range scan operations. Jiffy is built as a multiversioned lock-free skip list and relies on CPU's Time Stamp Counter register to generate version numbers at minimal cost. For faster skip list traversals and better utilization of the CPU caches, key-value entries are grouped into immutable objects called revisions. Moreover, by changing the size of revisions and thus modifying the synchronization granularity, our index can adapt to varying contentions levels (smaller revisions are more suited for write-heavy workloads whereas large revisions benefit read-dominated workloads, especially when they feature many range scan operations). Structure modifications to the index, which result in changing the size of revisions, happen through (lock-free) skip list node split and merge operations that are carefully coordinated with the update operations. Despite rich semantics, Jiffy offers highly scalable performance, which is comparable or exceeds the performance of the state-of-the-art lock-free ordered indices that feature linearizable range scan operations. Compared to its (lock-based) rivals that also support batch updates, Jiffy can execute large batch updates up to 7.4x more efficiently.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Jiffy，这是第一个无锁、可线性化的有序键值索引，它提供 (1) 批量更新，即原子执行的放置和删除操作，以及 (2) 由范围扫描操作等使用的一致快照。 Jiffy 被构建为多版本无锁跳跃列表，并依赖 CPU 的时间戳计数器寄存器以最小的成本生成版本号。为了更快地遍历跳过列表并更好地利用 CPU 缓存，键值条目被分组为称为修订的不可变对象。此外，通过更改修订的大小并从而修改同步粒度，我们的索引可以适应不同的争用级别（较小的修订更适合写入密集型工作负载，而大修订则有利于读取主导的工作负载，特别是当它们具有许多范围扫描操作时）。对索引的结构修改会导致修订大小的更改，这是通过与更新操作仔细协调的（无锁）跳过列表节点拆分和合并操作来进行的。尽管语义丰富，Jiffy 仍提供高度可扩展的性能，其性能可与或超过具有可线性化范围扫描操作的最先进的无锁有序索引的性能。与同样支持批量更新的（基于锁的）竞争对手相比，Jiffy 执行大批量更新的效率高达 7.4 倍。

items.title: Towards OmpSs-2 and OpenACC interoperation.
items.abstract: The increasing demand in HPC to utilize accelerators has motivated the development of pragma-based directives to target these devices. OmpSs-2 and OpenACC are both directive-based solutions that allow application programmers to utilize accelerators. The two leverage distinct types of parallelism: task parallelism and data parallelism, respectively. Non-trivial scientific applications can benefit from both types of available parallelism. However, the combination of pragma-based models is difficult to coordinate, as both assume full control and are unaware of each other at runtime. We propose an interoperation mechanism to enable novel composability across pragma-based programming models. We study and propose a clear separation of duties and implement our approach by augmenting the OmpSs-2 programming model, compiler and runtime to support OmpSs-2 + OpenACC programming.
items.abstract_zh: HPC 对使用加速器的需求不断增长，推动了针对这些设备的基于编译指示的指令的开发。 OmpSs-2 和 OpenACC 都是基于指令的解决方案，允许应用程序员利用加速器。两者利用不同类型的并行性：分别是任务并行性和数据并行性。重要的科学应用程序可以从这两种类型的可用并行性中受益。然而，基于编译指示的模型的组合很难协调，因为两者都假设完全控制并且在运行时彼此不知道。我们提出了一种互操作机制，以实现跨基于编译指示的编程模型的新型可组合性。我们研究并提出了明确的职责分离，并通过增强 OmpSs-2 编程模型、编译器和运行时来支持 OmpSs-2 + OpenACC 编程来实施我们的方法。

items.title: Optimizing consistency for partially replicated data stores.
items.abstract: We present a framework that allows programmers to specify replicated data stores through application logic, data replication scheme, and high-level invariants that needs to be satisfied. From such specifications all the needed consistency requirements can be inferred from traces of executions of the potential data store, to determine the optimal data store coordination. The framework supports arbitrarily complex data store operations and partial data replication. This leads to expressiveness for a wide range of data stores, with significant run-time performance benefits.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个框架，允许程序员通过应用程序逻辑、数据复制方案和需要满足的高级不变量来指定复制数据存储。根据此类规范，可以从潜在数据存储的执行轨迹推断出所有所需的一致性要求，以确定最佳数据存储协调。该框架支持任意复杂的数据存储操作和部分数据复制。这带来了广泛的数据存储的表现力，并具有显着的运行时性能优势。

items.title: Asymmetry-aware scalable locking.
items.abstract: The pursuit of power-efficiency is popularizing asymmetric multicore processors (AMP) such as ARM big.LITTLE, Apple M1 and recent Intel Alder Lake with big and little cores. However, we find that existing scalable locks fail to scale on AMP and cause collapses in either throughput or latency, or both, because their implicit assumption of symmetric cores no longer holds. To address this issue, we propose the first asymmetry-aware scalable lock named LibASL. LibASL provides a new lock ordering guided by applications' latency requirements, which allows big cores to reorder with little cores for higher throughput under the condition of preserving applications' latency requirements. Using LibASL only requires linking the applications with it and, if latency-critical, inserting few lines of code to annotate the coarse-grained latency requirement. We evaluate LibASL in various benchmarks including five popular databases on Apple M1. Evaluation results show that LibASL can improve the throughput by up to 5 times while precisely preserving the tail latency designated by applications.
items.abstract_zh: 对功效的追求正在普及非对称多核处理器 (AMP)，例如 ARM big.LITTLE、Apple M1 以及最新的具有大小核的英特尔 Alder Lake。然而，我们发现现有的可扩展锁无法在 AMP 上扩展，并导致吞吐量或延迟或两者兼而有之的崩溃，因为它们对对称核心的隐式假设不再成立。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了第一个非对称感知的可扩展锁，名为 LibASL。 LibASL 提供了一种以应用程序延迟要求为指导的新锁排序，允许大核对小核进行重新排序，从而在保留应用程序延迟要求的情况下获得更高的吞吐量。使用 LibASL 只需将应用程序与其链接起来，如果延迟至关重要，则插入几行代码来注释粗粒度延迟要求。我们在各种基准测试中评估 LibASL，包括 Apple M1 上的五个流行数据库。评估结果表明，LibASL 可以将吞吐量提高多达 5 倍，同时精确保留应用程序指定的尾部延迟。

items.title: BaGuaLu: targeting brain scale pretrained models with over 37 million cores.
Parallel algorithms for masked sparse matrix-matrix products.
items.abstract: Computing the product of two sparse matrices (SpGEMM) is a fundamental operation in various combinatorial and graph algorithms as well as various bioinformatics and data analytics applications for computing inner-product similarities. For an important class of algorithms, only a subset of the output entries are needed, and the resulting operation is known as Masked SpGEMM since a subset of the output entries is considered to be “masked out”.
items.abstract_zh: 计算两个稀疏矩阵的乘积 (SpGEMM) 是各种组合和图形算法以及用于计算内积相似性的各种生物信息学和数据分析应用程序中的基本操作。对于一类重要的算法，只需要输出条目的子集，并且生成的操作称为 Masked SpGEMM，因为输出条目的子集被认为是“屏蔽掉”的。

items.title: Bundling linked data structures for linearizable range queries.
items.abstract: We present bundled references, a new building block to provide linearizable range query operations for highly concurrent lock-based linked data structures. Bundled references allow range queries to traverse a path through the data structure that is consistent with the target atomic snapshot. We demonstrate our technique with three data structures: a linked list, skip list, and a binary search tree. Our evaluation reveals that in mixed workloads, our design can improve upon the state-of-the-art techniques by 1.2x-1.8x for a skip list and 1.3x-3.7x for a binary search tree. We also integrate our bundled data structure into the DBx1000 in-memory database, yielding up to 40% gain over the same competitors.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了捆绑引用，这是一个新的构建块，为高度并发的基于锁的链接数据结构提供可线性化的范围查询操作。捆绑引用允许范围查询遍历与目标原子快照一致的数据结构的路径。我们用三种数据结构演示我们的技术：链表、跳跃列表和二叉搜索树。我们的评估表明，在混合工作负载中，我们的设计可以将跳跃列表的最先进技术提高 1.2 倍至 1.8 倍，将二叉搜索树提高 1.3 倍至 3.7 倍。我们还将捆绑的数据结构集成到 DBx1000 内存数据库中，与相同竞争对手相比，性能提升高达 40%。

items.title: TileSpGEMM: a tiled algorithm for parallel sparse general matrix-matrix multiplication on GPUs.
items.abstract: Sparse general matrix multiplication (SpGEMM) is an important and expensive computation primitive in many real-world applications. Due to SpGEMM’s inherent irregularity and the vast diversity of its input matrices, developing high-performance SpGEMM implementation on modern processors such as GPUs is challenging. The state-of-the-art SpGEMM libraries (i.e., nsparse and spECK) adopt several algorithms to tackle the challenges of global load balance, local load balance, and allocation of the result matrix. While these libraries focus on the high-level algorithm design for SpGEMM, they neglect several low-level architecture-specific optimizations, which causes inefficient implementations in their libraries. In this paper, we classify their inefficient implementations into several categories. Based on our observations, we propose a highly optimized SpGEMM library called OpSparse. The optimizations in OpSparse include 1) optimizing the binning method by improving the utilization of the shared memory, 2) optimizing the hashing method by reducing the access to the hash table, 3) improving the trade-off between hash collision rate and hardware utilization in the hashing method by setting appropriate binning ranges, 4) reducing the overheads of global memory utilization by minimizing the global memory usage of the metadata, and 5) improving the execution parallelism by overlapping global memory allocation with kernel execution. Performance evaluations with 26 commonly used matrices on an Nvidia Tesla V100 GPU show that OpSparse achieves on average 7.35× (up to 27.8×), 1.43× (up to 1.81×), and 1.52× (up to 2.04×) speedups over three state-of-the-art SpGEMM libraries: cuSPARSE, nsparse, and spECK, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏通用矩阵乘法（SpGEMM）是许多实际应用中重要且昂贵的计算原语。由于 SpGEMM 固有的不规则性及其输入矩阵的巨大多样性，在 GPU 等现代处理器上开发高性能 SpGEMM 实现具有挑战性。最先进的 SpGEMM 库（即 nsparse 和 spECK）采用多种算法来解决全局负载平衡、局部负载平衡和结果矩阵分配的挑战。虽然这些库专注于 SpGEMM 的高级算法设计，但它们忽略了一些低级架构特定的优化，这导致库中的实现效率低下。在本文中，我们将它们的低效实现分为几类。根据我们的观察，我们提出了一个高度优化的 SpGEMM 库，称为 OpSparse。 OpSparse中的优化包括1）通过提高共享内存的利用率来优化分箱方法，2）通过减少对哈希表的访问来优化散列方法，3）通过设置适当的分箱范围来改善散列方法中散列冲突率和硬件利用率之间的权衡，4）通过最小化元数据的全局内存使用来减少全局内存利用率的开销，以及5）通过将全局内存分配与内核执行重叠来提高执行并行度。在 Nvidia Tesla V100 GPU 上对 26 个常用矩阵进行的性能评估表明，OpSparse 比三个最先进的 SpGEMM 库平均实现 7.35×（高达 27.8×）、1.43×（高达 1.81×）和 1.52×（高达 2.04×）加速：cuSPARSE、分别是nsparse和spECK。

items.title: Remote OpenMP offloading.
items.abstract: OpenMP has a long and successful history in parallel programming for CPUs, and more recently GPUs through accelerator offloading.
items.abstract_zh: OpenMP 在 CPU 并行编程以及最近通过加速器卸载的 GPU 并行编程方面拥有悠久而成功的历史。

items.title: Multi-queues can be state-of-the-art priority schedulers.
items.abstract: Designing and implementing efficient parallel priority schedulers is an active research area. An intriguing proposed design is the Multi-Queue: given n threads and m ≥ n distinct priority queues, task insertions are performed uniformly at random, while, to delete, a thread picks two queues uniformly at random, and removes the observed task of higher priority. This approach scales well, and has probabilistic rank guarantees: roughly, the rank of each task removed, relative to remaining tasks in all other queues, is O (m) in expectation. Yet, the performance of this pattern is below that of well-engineered schedulers, which eschew theoretical guarantees for practical efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 设计和实现高效的并行优先级调度程序是一个活跃的研究领域。一个有趣的设计是多队列：给定 n 个线程和 m ≥ n 个不同的优先级队列，任务插入是随机统一执行的，而删除时，线程统一随机选择两个队列，并删除观察到的更高优先级的任务。这种方法可以很好地扩展，并且具有概率排名保证：粗略地说，相对于所有其他队列中的剩余任务，每个删除的任务的排名预计为 O(m)。然而，这种模式的性能低于精心设计的调度程序，后者回避了实际效率的理论保证。

items.title: Understanding and detecting deep memory persistency bugs in NVM programs with DeepMC.
items.abstract: To facilitate programming with non-volatile memory (NVM), a set of memory persistency models, such as strict and epoch persistency, have been proposed. Although these models provide high-level guidance for reasoning about the data persistence, implementing them correctly is nontrivial. Our study of the well-developed NVM frameworks and libraries reveals that many of them have deep semantic bugs that are strongly relevant to the model specifications. Furthermore, it is difficult to detect them with existing testing and bug-finding tools.
items.abstract_zh: 为了方便使用非易失性存储器（NVM）进行编程，人们提出了一组存储器持久性模型，例如严格持久性和纪元持久性。尽管这些模型为推理数据持久性提供了高级指导，但正确实现它们并非易事。我们对成熟的 NVM 框架和库的研究表明，其中许多框架和库都存在与模型规范密切相关的深层语义错误。此外，使用现有的测试和错误查找工具很难检测到它们。

items.title: Mashup: making serverless computing useful for HPC workflows via hybrid execution.
items.abstract: Scripts and results of "Rohan Basu Roy, et al., Mashup: Making Serverless Computing Useful for HPC Workflows via Hybrid Execution. In Proceedings of the 27th ACM SIGPLAN Symposium on Principles and Practice of Parallel Programming, 2022".
items.abstract_zh: “Rohan Basu Roy 等人，Mashup：通过混合执行使无服务器计算对 HPC 工作流有用。2022 年第 27 届 ACM SIGPLAN 并行编程原理与实践研讨会论文集”的脚本和结果。

items.title: Rethinking graph data placement for graph neural network training on multiple GPUs.
items.abstract: Graph partitioning is commonly used for dividing graph data for parallel processing. While they achieve good performance for the traditional graph processing algorithms, the existing graph partitioning methods are unsatisfactory for data-parallel GNN training on GPUs. In this work, we rethink the graph data placement problem for large-scale GNN training on multiple GPUs. We find that loading input features is a performance bottleneck for GNN training on large graphs that cannot be stored on GPU. To reduce the data loading overhead, we first propose a performance model of data movement among CPU and GPUs in GNN training. Then, based on the performance model, we provide an efficient algorithm to divide and distribute the graph data onto multiple GPUs so that the data loading time is minimized. For cases where data placement alone cannot achieve good performance, we propose a locality-aware neighbor sampling technique to further reduce the data movement overhead without losing accuracy. Our experiments with graphs of different sizes on different numbers of GPUs show that our techniques not only achieve smaller data loading time but also incur much less preprocessing overhead than the existing graph partitioning methods.
items.abstract_zh: 图分区通常用于划分图数据以进行并行处理。虽然它们在传统的图处理算法中取得了良好的性能，但现有的图划分方法对于 GPU 上的数据并行 GNN 训练并不能令人满意。在这项工作中，我们重新思考了在多个 GPU 上进行大规模 GNN 训练的图数据放置问题。我们发现加载输入特征是在无法存储在 GPU 上的大型图上进行 GNN 训练的性能瓶颈。为了减少数据加载开销，我们首先提出了 GNN 训练中 CPU 和 GPU 之间数据移动的性能模型。然后，基于性能模型，我们提供了一种有效的算法来将图数据划分并分布到多个GPU上，从而最小化数据加载时间。对于仅靠数据放置无法实现良好性能的情况，我们提出了一种局部感知邻居采样技术，以在不损失准确性的情况下进一步减少数据移动开销。我们在不同数量的 GPU 上对不同大小的图进行的实验表明，与现有的图划分方法相比，我们的技术不仅实现了更短的数据加载时间，而且产生的预处理开销也少得多。

items.title: Elimination (a, b)-trees with fast, durable updates.
items.abstract: Many concurrent dictionary implementations are designed and optimized for read-mostly workloads with uniformly distributed keys, and often perform poorly on update-heavy workloads. In this work, we first present a concurrent (a,b)-tree, the OCC-ABtree, which outperforms its fastest competitor by up to 2x on uniform update-heavy workloads, and is competitive on other workloads. We then turn our attention to skewed update-heavy workloads (which feature many inserts/deletes on the same key) and introduce the Elim-ABtree, which features a new optimization called publishing elimination. In publishing elimination, concurrent inserts and deletes to a key are reordered to eliminate them. This reduces the number of writes in the data structure. The Elim-ABtree achieves up to 2.5x the performance of its fastest competitor (including the OCC-ABtree). The OCC-ABtree and Elim-ABtree are linearizable. We also introduce durable linearizable versions1 for systems with Intel Optane DCPMM non-volatile main memory that are nearly as fast.
items.abstract_zh: 许多并发字典实现是针对具有均匀分布键的以读取为主的工作负载而设计和优化的，并且通常在更新繁重的工作负载上表现不佳。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种并发 (a,b) 树，即 OCC-ABtree，它在统一更新密集型工作负载上的性能比其最快的竞争对手高出 2 倍，并且在其他工作负载上也具有竞争力。然后，我们将注意力转向倾斜的更新密集型工作负载（其特征是在同一键上进行多次插入/删除），并引入 Elim-ABtree，其特征是一种称为发布消除的新优化。在发布消除中，对某个键的并发插入和删除会被重新排序以消除它们。这减少了数据结构中的写入次数。 Elim-ABtree 的性能比其最快的竞争对手（包括 OCC-ABtree）高出 2.5 倍。 OCC-ABtree 和 Elim-ABtree 是可线性化的。我们还为配备英特尔傲腾 DCPMM 非易失性主内存的系统推出了耐用的线性化版本1，其速度几乎相同。

items.title: QGTC: accelerating quantized graph neural networks via GPU tensor core.
items.abstract: Over the most recent years, quantized graph neural network (QGNN) attracts lots of research and industry attention due to its high robustness and low computation and memory overhead. Unfortunately, the performance gains of QGNN have never been realized on modern GPU platforms. To this end, we propose the first Tensor Core (TC) based computing framework, QGTC, to support any-bitwidth computation for QGNNs on GPUs. We introduce a novel quantized low-bit arithmetic design based on the low-bit data representation and bit-decomposed computation. We craft a novel TC-tailored CUDA kernel design by incorporating 3D-stacked bit compression, zero-tile jumping, and non-zero tile reuse technique to improve the performance systematically. We incorporate an effective bandwidth-optimized subgraph packing strategy to maximize the transferring efficiency between CPU host and GPU device. We integrate QGTC with Pytorch for better programmability and extensibility. Extensive experiments demonstrate that QGTC achieves on average 2.7x speedup compared with the state-of-the-art Deep Graph Library framework across diverse settings.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，量化图神经网络（QGNN）因其高鲁棒性、低计算和内存开销而吸引了大量研究和业界的关注。不幸的是，QGNN 的性能提升从未在现代 GPU 平台上实现。为此，我们提出了第一个基于 Tensor Core (TC) 的计算框架 QGTC，以支持 GPU 上 QGNN 的任意位宽计算。我们引入了一种基于低位数据表示和位分解计算的新型量化低位算术设计。我们通过结合 3D 堆叠位压缩、零瓦片跳跃和非零瓦片重用技术，精心设计了一种新颖的 TC 定制 CUDA 内核设计，以系统地提高性能。我们采用有效的带宽优化子图打包策略来最大限度地提高 CPU 主机和 GPU 设备之间的传输效率。我们将 QGTC 与 Pytorch 集成，以实现更好的可编程性和可扩展性。大量实验表明，与最先进的深度图库框架相比，QGTC 在不同的设置下平均实现了 2.7 倍的加速。

items.title: ParGeo: a library for parallel computational geometry.
items.abstract: This paper presents ParGeo, a multicore library for computational geometry. ParGeo contains modules for fundamental tasks including $k$d-tree based spatial search, spatial graph generation, and algorithms in computational geometry. We focus on three new algorithmic contributions provided in the library. First, we present a new parallel convex hull algorithm based on a reservation technique to enable parallel modifications to the hull. We also provide the first parallel implementations of the randomized incremental convex hull algorithm as well as a divide-and-conquer convex hull algorithm in $\mathbb{R}^3$. Second, for the smallest enclosing ball problem, we propose a new sampling-based algorithm to quickly reduce the size of the data set. We also provide the first parallel implementation of Welzl's classic algorithm for smallest enclosing ball. Third, we present the BDL-tree, a parallel batch-dynamic $k$d-tree that allows for efficient parallel updates and $k$-NN queries over dynamically changing point sets. BDL-trees consist of a log-structured set of $k$d-trees which can be used to efficiently insert, delete, and query batches of points in parallel. On 36 cores with two-way hyper-threading, our fastest convex hull algorithm achieves up to 44.7x self-relative parallel speedup and up to 559x speedup against the best existing sequential implementation. Our smallest enclosing ball algorithm using our sampling-based algorithm achieves up to 27.1x self-relative parallel speedup and up to 178x speedup against the best existing sequential implementation. Our implementation of the BDL-tree achieves self-relative parallel speedup of up to 46.1x. Across all of the algorithms in ParGeo, we achieve self-relative parallel speedup of 8.1--46.61x.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 ParGeo，一个用于计算几何的多核库。 ParGeo 包含用于基本任务的模块，包括基于 $k$d 树的空间搜索、空间图生成和计算几何算法。我们重点关注库中提供的三个新算法贡献。首先，我们提出了一种基于预留技术的新的并行凸包算法，以实现对凸包的并行修改。我们还在 $\mathbb{R}^3$ 中提供了随机增量凸包算法以及分而治之凸包算法的第一个并行实现。其次，对于最小包围球问题，我们提出了一种新的基于采样的算法来快速减小数据集的大小。我们还提供了 Welzl 的最小包围球经典算法的第一个并行实现。第三，我们提出了 BDL 树，这是一种并行批量动态 $k$d 树，它允许在动态变化的点集上进行高效的并行更新和 $k$-NN 查询。 BDL 树由一组日志结构的 $k$d 树组成，可用于高效地并行插入、删除和查询批量点。在具有双向超线程的 36 个内核上，我们最快的凸包算法与现有最佳顺序实现相比，可实现高达 44.7 倍的自相关并行加速和高达 559 倍的加速。我们的最小封闭球算法使用基于采样的算法，与现有最佳顺序实现相比，可实现高达 27.1 倍的自相关并行加速和高达 178 倍的加速。我们的 BDL 树实现实现了高达 46.1 倍的自相关并行加速。在 ParGeo 中的所有算法中，我们实现了 8.1--46.61 倍的自相关并行加速。

items.title: FliT: a library for simple and efficient persistent algorithms.
items.abstract: Non-volatile random access memory (NVRAM) offers byte-addressable persistence at speeds comparable to DRAM. However, with caches remaining volatile, automatic cache evictions can reorder updates to memory, potentially leaving persistent memory in an inconsistent state upon a system crash. Flush and fence instructions can be used to force ordering among updates, but are expensive. This has motivated significant work studying how to write correct and efficient persistent programs for NVRAM. In this paper, we present FliT, a C++ library that facilitates writing efficient persistent code. Using the library's default mode makes any linearizable data structure durable with minimal changes to the code. FliT avoids many redundant flush instructions by using a novel algorithm to track dirty cache lines. The FliT library also allows for extra optimizations, but achieves good performance even in its default setting. To describe the FliT library's capabilities and guarantees, we define a persistent programming interface, called the P-V Interface, which FliT implements. The P-V Interface captures the expected behavior of code in which some instructions' effects are persisted and some are not. We show that the interface captures the desired semantics of many practical algorithms in the literature. We apply the FliT library to four different persistent data structures, and show that across several workloads, persistence implementations, and data structure sizes, the FliT library always improves operation throughput, by at least $2.1\times$ over a naive implementation in all but one workload.
items.abstract_zh: 非易失性随机存取存储器 (NVRAM) 以与 DRAM 相当的速度提供字节可寻址持久性。然而，由于缓存保持易失性，自动缓存驱逐可能会对内存更新进行重新排序，从而可能在系统崩溃时使持久内存处于不一致的状态。刷新和栅栏指令可用于强制更新之间的排序，但成本昂贵。这激发了研究如何为 NVRAM 编写正确且高效的持久程序的大量工作。在本文中，我们介绍了 FliT，这是一个有助于编写高效持久代码的 C++ 库。使用库的默认模式可以使任何可线性化的数据结构持久耐用，并且只需对代码进行最少的更改。 FliT 通过使用一种新颖的算法来跟踪脏缓存行，避免了许多冗余刷新指令。 FliT 库还允许进行额外的优化，但即使在默认设置下也能实现良好的性能。为了描述 FliT 库的功能和保证，我们定义了一个持久编程接口，称为 P-V 接口，由 FliT 实现。 P-V 接口捕获代码的预期行为，其中某些指令的效果得以保留，而另一些则不然。我们证明该接口捕获了文献中许多实用算法所需的语义。我们将 FliT 库应用于四种不同的持久性数据结构，并表明，在多种工作负载、持久性实现和数据结构大小中，FliT 库始终能够提高操作吞吐量，比除一种工作负载之外的所有工作负载中的简单实现至少提高 2.1 倍。

items.title: Parallel block-delayed sequences.
items.abstract: Programming languages using functions on collections of values, such as map, reduce, scan and filter, have been used for over fifty years. Such collections have proven to be particularly useful in the context of parallelism because such functions are naturally parallel. However, if implemented naively they lead to the generation of temporary intermediate collections that can significantly increase memory usage and runtime. To avoid this pitfall, many approaches use "fusion" to combine operations and avoid temporary results. However, most of these approaches involve significant changes to a compiler and are limited to a small set of functions, such as maps and reduces.
items.abstract_zh: 使用值集合函数的编程语言，例如映射、减少、扫描和过滤，已经使用了五十多年。事实证明，此类集合在并行性上下文中特别有用，因为此类函数本质上是并行的。然而，如果简单地实现，它们会导致生成临时中间集合，从而显着增加内存使用量和运行时间。为了避免这个陷阱，许多方法使用“融合”来组合操作并避免临时结果。然而，这些方法中的大多数都涉及对编译器的重大更改，并且仅限于一小组函数，例如映射和归约。

items.title: A W-cycle algorithm for efficient batched SVD on GPUs.
items.abstract: As a fundamental factorization operation, the singular value decomposition (SVD) plays a paramount role in abroad range of domains such as scientific computing and machine learning. Due to its computational bottleneck of factorization for small matrices in real-world applications, many GPU-accelerated batched SVD algorithms have been investigated recently. However, these algorithms failed to achieve a balance between data locality and parallelism because their workflows depend on the size of each matrix. In this work, we propose a matrix-size-independent W-cycle algorithm to accelerate the batched one-side Jacobi SVD on GPUs, which successfully strikes the balance between data locality and parallelism. The experimental evaluation demonstrates that the proposed algorithm achieves 4.5X performance speedup on average over the state-of-the-art cuSOLVER.
items.abstract_zh: 作为一种基本的因式分解运算，奇异值分解（SVD）在科学计算和机器学习等广泛领域中发挥着至关重要的作用。由于实际应用中小矩阵分解的计算瓶颈，最近研究了许多 GPU 加速的批量 SVD 算法。然而，这些算法未能实现数据局部性和并行性之间的平衡，因为它们的工作流程取决于每个矩阵的大小。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种与矩阵大小无关的 W-cycle 算法来加速 GPU 上的批量单边 Jacobi SVD，成功地实现了数据局部性和并行性之间的平衡。实验评估表明，所提出的算法比最先进的 cuSOLVER 平均实现 4.5 倍的性能加速。

items.title: LB-HM: load balance-aware data placement on heterogeneous memory for task-parallel HPC applications.
items.abstract: LB-HM: Load Balance-Aware Data Placement on Heterogeneous Memory for Task-Parallel HPC Applications
items.abstract_zh: LB-HM：任务并行 HPC 应用程序的异构内存上的负载平衡感知数据放置

items.title: An LLVM-based open-source compiler for NVIDIA GPUs.
items.abstract: We present GASS, an LLVM-based open-source compiler for NVIDIA GPU's SASS machine assembly. GASS is the first open-source compiler targeting SASS, and it provides a unified toolchain for currently fragmented low-level performance research on NVIDIA GPUs. GASS supports all recent architectures, including Volta, Turing, and Ampere.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出 GASS，这是一个基于 LLVM 的开源编译器，适用于 NVIDIA GPU 的 SASS 机器组装。 GASS是第一个针对SASS的开源编译器，它为目前分散的NVIDIA GPU低级性能研究提供了统一的工具链。 GASS 支持所有最新架构，包括 Volta、Turing 和 Ampere。

items.title: High performance GPU concurrent B+tree.
items.abstract: Concurrent B+trees have been widely used in many systems from file systems to databases. With the volume of data requests expanding exponentially, the systems are facing tremendous performance pressure. GPUs have shown their potential to accelerate the concurrent B+trees operations with their high volume of parallel computing resources and large memory bandwidth. In concurrent B+tree, the conflicts should be detected and resolved when multiple concurrent requests are traversing and operating on the tree. However, conflict detection and handling in concurrent B+tree complicates the request processing logic, increases the number of memory accesses and leads to execution path divergence. That leads to performance degradation and increased response time variance.
items.abstract_zh: 并发B+树已广泛应用于从文件系统到数据库的许多系统中。随着数据请求量呈指数级增长，系统面临着巨大的性能压力。 GPU 凭借其大量并行计算资源和大内存带宽，展现了加速并发 B+ 树操作的潜力。在并发B+树中，当多个并发请求在树上遍历和操作时，应该检测并解决冲突。然而，并发B+树中的冲突检测和处理使请求处理逻辑变得复杂，增加了内存访问次数并导致执行路径发散。这会导致性能下降和响应时间方差增加。

items.title: Vapro: performance variance detection and diagnosis for production-run parallel applications.
